mechanism: Non-linear price spikes from low exporter stocks-to-use interact with the broken demand thermostat: prices spike but demand does not contract sufficiently (Kalecki support maintained), so prices remain elevated rather than self-correcting, creating persistent inflationary pulses.
regime_dependence: Activated when exporter stocks-to-use falls below threshold (~16% wheat, ~12-14% corn) during active fiscal dominance. The interaction is asymmetric: supply shocks are amplified, supply responses are delayed by biological constraints.
